rules.title: Medical Payer Assignment
rules.body: Code snippet to be added. This section will contain the logic for assigning members to payer categories (Commercial, Medicaid, Medicare) based on plan type and coverage flags.

rules.title: Dental Payer Assignment
rules.body: Code snippet to be added. Pull medical records first per year, do collision reduction, roll up start/end dates. Then pull dental member records into a separate dental plans table. Apply ranking so each standalone dental plan maps to exactly one medical plan type.

rules.title: Assign county based on most-recently-updated record per year
rules.body: County should be assigned based on the most-recently-updated county per year — not per quarter, unless the project requires quarterly granularity. The ZIP-to-county crosswalk is in geoinfo.clean_county_xwalk.

rules.title: Views can be ~10x slower than native tables
rules.body: SAS views re-execute their underlying query at every reference. For member/enrollment lookups used repeatedly in a program, always materialize to a native table. Character date fields in views also require input() wrappers before any numeric comparison.

rules.title: Age category as of Jan 1 of the year OR enrollment start, whichever is later
rules.body: Determine age category as of January 1 of the year in question OR the enrollment start date, whichever comes later. Adult = age 19+. Child = age 18 and under. Run analysis on the regular member table — not the enrollment segment table.
